     the Fermi energy is    -0.2960 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.88716844 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.8E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08780982 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.79935862 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -241367.44473189 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  121793.37658055 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.13086712 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  112016.42248236 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.02282252 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.64 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  36 iterations
